Then complete this task:

Task #652: Blog: AI Presentation Tools Compared

Description: Pillar: Product Spotlight. Honest comparison of AI presentation tools. Prereq: Kvoth research on current features/pricing.

IMPORTANT: Kvoth has already completed the research. Read it here:
~/clawd/artifacts/kvoth/2026-03-01/ai-tools-comparison.md

This is a comprehensive competitive analysis covering Gamma, Tome, Beautiful.ai, Canva AI, Google Slides AI, Microsoft Copilot, Slidebean, and Pitch — with pricing, features, quality assessments, and market gaps.

Process:
1. Read Kvoth research thoroughly
2. Create outline: ~/clawd/artifacts/hemingway/2026-03-01/outline-task-652.md
3. Write the full blog draft: ~/clawd/artifacts/hemingway/2026-03-01/draft-task-652.md
   - Target: 2,000-2,500 words
   - Angle: honest, opinionated comparison from a consultant perspective
   - Highlight where SlideHeroes fits (consulting-grade structure, Pyramid Principle)
   - Include practical recommendation for different use cases
   - YAML frontmatter with agent, date, task_id, slug, word_count, target_keyword
4. Self-edit: cut filler, strengthen opening hook and closing CTA
5. Update MC task when done:
   curl -X PATCH http://localhost:3001/api/v1/tasks/652 -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{"status":"mike_review","activity_note":"Draft complete — ~/clawd/artifacts/hemingway/2026-03-01/draft-task-652.md"}"
